goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 15:30' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
